content.speakerText: Our storage room is under 24-hour camera surveillance and locked at night.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们的寄存室有24小时监控，夜间上锁。

options.text: That's reassuring. Are the bags checked before storage?
How much does it cost to store my luggage?
Can I leave my suitcase here for a week?
Do you have Wi-Fi in the lobby?

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了对方关于安全措施的陈述，表达了安心并进一步询问检查流程，符合‘询问安全性’场景的核心目的。其他选项分别询问价格、寄存时长和Wi-Fi，与安全主题无关。

content.speakerText: We use security tags on all luggage and have staff on duty every hour.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们为所有行李使用安全标签，并每小时有工作人员巡逻。

options.text: That sounds secure. Is there a backup system if the cameras fail?
Can I pay with a credit card?

content.explanation: 正确答案进一步追问了安全系统的可靠性，体现了对安全措施的深度关注，符合场景目标。其他选项与安全无关，属于无关服务询问。

content.speakerText: All stored items are scanned and logged in our system.
content.speakerTextCn: 所有寄存物品都会被扫描并录入我们的系统。

options.text: Is there any insurance coverage if something goes missing?
Can I get a receipt for this?
How many items can I store at once?
Do you have a loyalty program?

content.explanation: 正确答案询问保险保障，是安全性话题中关键的补充问题，体现顾客对风险的担忧。其他选项虽合理，但偏离了安全核心，属于服务流程或优惠问题。

content.template: Is there insurance if something gets ___?
content.hint: 顾客担心行李丢失时的保障措施
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：insurance if something gets lost

content.template: Are the bags ___ before they're stored?
content.hint: 安全流程中常见的前置检查动作
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：check bags before storage

content.template: The storage area is under ___-hour camera surveillance.
content.hint: 安全监控的标准表述，表示全天候监控

content.speakerText: Our storage room is under 24-hour camera surveillance and locked at night.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们的寄存室有24小时监控，夜间上锁。
expectedAnswers: That's reassuring. Are the bags checked before storage?
Good to know. Do you have insurance for lost items?
That sounds secure. Is there any staff monitoring the cameras in real time?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否针对安全措施提出合理追问
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常表达习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了如 insurance, checked, surveillance 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: We use security tags on all luggage and have staff on duty every hour.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们为所有行李使用安全标签，并每小时有工作人员巡逻。
expectedAnswers: That’s good. Is there a backup system if the tags get damaged?
I’m glad to hear that. What happens if someone tries to take a bag without the tag?
Thanks for the info. Are the tags linked to your system so I can track my bag?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否针对安全机制提出有深度的跟进问题
语言准确性：是否正确使用被动语态、条件句等结构
表达自然度：是否避免机械套用，体现真实对话节奏
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 security tags, staff on duty, backup system 等关键词

content.speakerText: All stored items are scanned and logged in our system.
content.speakerTextCn: 所有寄存物品都会被扫描并录入我们的系统。
expectedAnswers: That’s reassuring. Can I get a copy of the log for my records?
Good. Is the system secure from hacking or data loss?
So if I lose my receipt, can you still find my bag using the scan record?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否关注数据安全与信息可追溯性
语言准确性：是否正确使用条件句、被动语态和专业词汇
表达自然度：是否自然衔接前文，避免生硬提问
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 scanned, logged, system, record, secure 等关键词
